question: Among Harris, Dallas, Hidalgo, Bexar, and Tarrant counties, find the one that in the fiscal year matching the year (within 2020-2022) that has the highest total subway ridership in MTA had more than 600 child protective service removals and fewer than 14,000 completed abuse/neglect investigations. Compare its establishment year with Tarrant County's; for the earlier of the two, report the admission-order number of the U.S. state admitted in that same year. Please return the order number only. Your response should be in the format [Answer].

1.fact: Summing Subways: Total Estimated Ridership by year (from Date) for 2020-2022, the maximum total is 1012505879 in 2022.
1.subquestion: Which year from 2020-2022 has the highest total subway ridership in MTA? (Use Date to derive year; sum Subways: Total Estimated Ridership by year and select the maximum.)

2.fact: In FY<node_1 answer> (2022), among the top 5 counties by average CACFP sites, Harris (23,468) and Dallas (14,192) had more than 14,000 completed child abuse/neglect investigations, while Tarrant (13,286), Bexar (13,020), and Hidalgo (4,984) had less than 14,000.
2.subquestion: Which counties from the top 5 by average CACFP sites (Harris, Dallas, Hidalgo, Bexar, Tarrant) had less than 14,000 completed child abuse/neglect investigations in FY<node_1 answer>? (Filter: Fiscal Year == <node_1 answer>; sum Completed Investigations by County; keep < 14,000.)

3.fact: In FY<node_1 answer> (2022), among the top 5 counties by average CACFP sites, Bexar (1,074) and Dallas (738) had more than 600 child protective service removals, while Harris (566), Tarrant (555), and Hidalgo (90) had 600 or fewer.
3.subquestion: Which counties from the top 5 by average CACFP sites (Harris, Dallas, Hidalgo, Bexar, Tarrant) had more than 600 CPS removals in FY<node_1 answer>? (Filter: Fiscal Year == <node_1 answer>; sum Removals by County; keep > 600.)

4.fact: According to Wikipedia, Bexar County 'was created on December 20, 1836' as one of the original counties of the Republic of Texas.
4.subquestion: When was <intersection of nodes 2-3: Bexar County> created?

5.fact: According to Wikipedia, Tarrant County was established in 1849.

6.fact: Arkansas was admitted to the Union as the 25th state on June 15, 1836.
6.subquestion: Which U.S. state was admitted to the Union in <earlier of nodes 4-5: 1836>, and what was its admission order number?

reasoning_chain: Node 1: Year with highest MTA subway ridership (2020-2022) -> 2022
Node 2: From top 5, investigations < 14,000 in FY<node_1 answer> -> {Tarrant, Bexar, Hidalgo}
Node 3: From top 5, CPS removals > 600 in FY<node_1 answer> -> {Bexar, Dallas}
Node 6: Arkansas -> admitted in 1836 as the 25th state
